texto: Cats, of course, are easier to make fun of. The cutest cat is still a freak. Where dogs are sympathetic, almost tragic, figures, cats are pure comedy. Dogs are your buddies, cats are entertainment They're like a TV show. There's nothing funnier than when a cat falls off of something. When a dog falls down a couple of stairs, you rush to it and console it. But when a cat does it, it's funny—you point at it and laugh (which they don't like, incidentally).
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Darby Conley: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Cats, of course, are easier to make fun of. The cutest cat is still a freak. Where dogs are sympa…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que humor, cats, dogs pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de dogs e humorous-quotes.

texto: Ethics are so annoying. I avoid them on principle.
explicacao: Citação de Darby Conley sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Ethics are so annoying. I avoid them on principle.” articula reflexao, ethics, annoying em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
